ChatRoom - Class in pjv.model
ChatRoom entity class.

ChatRoomHandler - Class in pjv.controller
This class contains static methods to create, delete and find ChatRoom instances in the PostgreSQL database.

ChatRoomHandlerTest() - Constructor for class pjv.controller.ChatRoomHandlerTest
 
checkUniquenessOfUserName(String) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method checks whether the username chosen by client is already in the database.
clean() - Method in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtilsTest
 
clearClients() - Method in class pjv.controller.Server
The method sends warning message to all connected clients and removes all clients from the database.
clearVariables() - Method in class pjv.view.ServerWindow
This method clears values of variables which temporarily store data.
Client - Class in pjv.model
Client entity class.
Client() - Constructor for class pjv.model.Client
 
ClientHandler - Class in pjv.controller
This class handles incoming client connection, enables sending and receiving messages from client.
ClientHandler(Socket) - Constructor for class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
The ClientHandler class constructor.
closeConnection() - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method closes communication and connection with connected client.

create_chatRoom_with_unique_name_does_not_throw_IOException_test() - Method in class pjv.controller.ChatRoomHandlerTest
 
createChatRoom(ActionEvent) - Method in class pjv.view.ServerWindow
This method creates new chatRoom.
createScene() - Method in class pjv.view.ServerWindow
This method creates a new scene for the primary stage of this application.
